examples: As demand grew, people began selling promissory notes guaranteeing the future delivery of prized tulip bulbs.
A promissory note as used in this Law means a banker's note.
Technically, a CD is a promissory note the issuing bank delivers to you.
Besides, Obama had delivered a promissory note to the American people that he would overcome partisanship.
This is the argument for replacing the promissory notes with a very long-term bond.
